description: Use this API to return an array of character values for subsystem branches. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr, carray = abrnchar(sid, owner, ties, flag, entry, string)
python_syntax: ierr, carray = abrnchar(sid, owner, ties, flag, entry, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: A flag indicating owner usage if ownership is a subsystem selection criterion (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem branches to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem branches to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: A flag indicating organization. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the branch quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: carray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for both interior subsystem branches and tie branches.

flag.description: for only in-service non-transformer branches and two-winding transformers.
for all non-transformer branches and two-winding transformers.

entry.description: for double entry (each branch in both directions).

string.description: From bus extended bus name (18 characters).
To bus name (three-winding transformer name for a three-winding transformer winding) (12 characters).
To bus extended bus name (three-winding transformer name and winding number for a three-winding transformer winding) (18 characters).
Metered bus extended bus name (18 characters).
Non-metered bus extended bus name (18 characters).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of CARRAY, is not large enough.
